_comment: Contact details (email, phone) are plausible placeholder-format examples for demo purposes only and must be verified before real-world use.

listings.name: Hotelbeds
listings.description: Hotelbeds is one of the world's largest bedbank platforms, aggregating hotel inventory from thousands of properties for resale to travel agencies, tour operators, and OTAs via B2B API. It also aggregates transfers, activities, and car rental content alongside hotel rooms.
usps: Largest bedbank by contracted hotel volume

listings.name: Expedia Partner Solutions (EPS)
listings.description: Expedia Partner Solutions provides API access to Expedia Group's vast hotel supply, letting airlines, banks, and travel resellers embed hotel booking into their own platforms via white-label or API integration. It leverages Expedia's negotiated rates and global inventory.
usps: Access to Expedia Group's massive inventory

listings.name: Agoda Partner API (YCS)
listings.description: Agoda's partner API and YCS (Your Connectivity Solution) let travel resellers and affiliates access Agoda's extensive Asia-Pacific-weighted hotel inventory for integration into their own booking platforms. It is part of the Booking Holdings family of brands.

listings.name: RateHawk (Emerging Travel Group)
listings.description: RateHawk is a B2B hotel and travel booking platform from Emerging Travel Group, providing travel agents and tour operators access to global hotel inventory, flights, and transfers at net rates. It has grown rapidly across Europe, CIS, and APAC markets.

listings.name: TBO Holidays
listings.description: TBO (Travel Boutique Online) is a B2B travel distribution platform providing travel agents worldwide access to hotel inventory, flights, and holiday packages, with particularly strong reach in India and the Middle East. It operates as an aggregator connecting multiple hotel suppliers.
usps: Dominant B2B player in India/Middle East

listings.name: WebBeds
listings.description: WebBeds, part of Web Travel Group, is a global B2B travel accommodation wholesaler aggregating hotel inventory for travel agents, tour operators, and airline booking platforms. It operates across multiple regional brands under one accommodation-focused network.

listings.name: Travco
listings.description: Travco is a global hotel accommodation wholesaler providing B2B hotel inventory and destination services to tour operators and travel agents, with a strong presence in Egypt and the wider Middle East and Europe. It is part of the DER Touristik group.

listings.name: GRNconnect
listings.description: GRNconnect (Global Reservation Network) is a B2B hotel booking platform providing travel agents and resellers access to hotel inventory across major destinations worldwide via API and web portal. It serves as a wholesale distribution layer for smaller travel businesses.
usps: Accessible B2B onboarding for smaller agencies

listings.name: DOTW (Destinations of the World)
listings.description: DOTW is a global hotel wholesaler and DMC providing B2B accommodation and destination services to travel agents and tour operators, with particular strength across the Middle East, Africa, and Asia. It combines bedbank inventory with ground handling services.

listings.name: Restel
listings.description: Restel is a Finnish hotel wholesaler and reservation platform providing B2B accommodation booking to travel agencies across the Nordics and Baltics, operating alongside its own Cumulus and Rantasipi hotel brands. It aggregates broader European hotel inventory for resale.
usps: Owns hotel brands alongside wholesale arm

listings.name: HotelsPro (Rakuten Travel Xchange)
listings.description: HotelsPro, part of Rakuten Travel Xchange, is a B2B hotel distribution platform aggregating global accommodation inventory for travel agents and resellers through API and web portal access. It leverages Rakuten's e-commerce technology backbone.
usps: Backed by Rakuten's global tech infrastructure

listings.name: Juniper Travel Technology
listings.description: Juniper Travel Technology provides a travel reservation and distribution system used by tour operators, DMCs, and wholesalers to manage and resell hotel, flight, and package inventory. Its platform serves as connective middleware between suppliers and B2B/B2C sales channels.

listings.name: Bonotel Exclusive Travel
listings.description: Bonotel Exclusive Travel is a hotel wholesaler specializing in luxury and premium accommodation, providing net rate hotel content to travel agents and tour operators primarily for leisure destinations in the Caribbean, Mexico, and beyond. It focuses on curated high-end hotel relationships.

listings.name: Miki Travel
listings.description: Miki Travel is a global hotel wholesaler and DMC network providing accommodation and ground services to tour operators and travel agents, with historical strength in serving Japanese and Asian outbound travel markets. It operates offices across major destinations worldwide.
usps: Deep expertise serving Asian outbound markets

listings.name: Hotelbeds Cars & Transfers
listings.description: Hotelbeds' Cars and Transfers division extends the company's core bedbank aggregation model to ground transportation, aggregating airport transfer and car rental inventory for the same B2B travel trade customer base. It complements hotel bookings with door-to-door logistics.
usps: Cross-sell synergy with Hotelbeds hotel API
Broad global ground transport supplier network

listings.name: W2M (World2Meet)
listings.description: W2M is a Spanish B2B travel wholesaler offering hotel, flight, and destination package aggregation to travel agencies, part of the Iberostar-linked travel group. It focuses on Spanish and Latin American outbound and inbound markets.
usps: Established agency trust in Iberian market
